rationale: Educ. Code §21.258 governs board of trustees consideration of hearing examiner recommendations in educator contract proceedings. It is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: The board of trustees or a subcommittee designated by the board shall consider the recommendation and record of the hearing examiner at the first board meeting for which notice can be posted in compliance with Chapter 551, Government Code, following the issuance of the recommendation.
_note: No conflict; rule_text pertains to educator employment hearing procedures, not property tax exemptions.
